mapper.insert: INSERT INTO students (student_id, password, name, grade, class, class_number, register_year, total_coupon, total_point) VALUES (#{studentId}, #{password}, #{name}, #{grade}, #{className}, #{classNumber}, EXTRACT(YEAR FROM SYSDATE), 0, 30000)
mapper.select: SELECT name, grade, class, class_number, total_point FROM students WHERE student_id = #{studentId} AND password = #{password}
SELECT student_id FROM students WHERE student_id = #{studentId}
